title: RUSPEPA Wired Christmas Holiday Ribbon - Red and White Stripe Ribbon - 63 mm x 22 m Each Roll - Red Wired Edge
features: Made of high-quality materials which are suitable for all your decorating needs never tear or crinkle or unravel. High-quality wired ribbon is easy to manipulate and held shape well, giving the bows a bit more "dimension".
2-1/2-inch wide, approx 63mm, perfect size for bows and adorning projects.
25 yards(22m) length is long enough for holidays: garland around Christmas tree, on door wreath, wrapped Christmas presents.
Red and white stripe ribbons look so beautiful and extra traditional, good for fancy wrapping.

Wired edge is perfect for craft projects, DIY, decoration, holiday gift wrapping and more! Wrap them around chairs, wine bottles, mason jars, gift baskets, vases, tables or chairs! Create bows with them to use as decorations. The decorative possibilities are endless!
description: Made of high-quality materials which are suitable for all your decorating needs never tear or crinkle or unravel. High-quality wired ribbon is easy to manipulate and held shape well, giving the bows a bit more "dimension". 2-1/2-inch wide, approx 63mm, perfect size for bows and adorning projects. 25 yards(22m) length is long enough for holidays: garland around Christmas tree, on door wreath, wrapped Christmas presents. Red and white stripe ribbons look so beautiful and extra traditional, good for fancy wrapping. Wired edge is perfect for craft projects, DIY, decoration, holiday gift wrapping and more! Wrap them around chairs, wine bottles, mason jars, gift baskets, vases, tables or chairs! Create bows with them to use as decorations. The decorative possibilities are endless! BUY NOW RISK FREE: If for any reason, you don't absolutely like it, just return it, and we'll refund every penny (or replace it, if there is a problem).
